about.description: A Full-stack Developer who loves turning ideas into reality. Whether on the front-end or back-end, I focus on seamless and beautiful solutions. With a passion for continuous learning and creative problem-solving, I strive to make a meaningful impact through technology.

experience.sectionSubtitle: A journey through my career highlights, showcasing key milestones, projects, and accomplishments.

techStack.sectionSubtitle: Explore the technologies and tools powering my projects.

projects.sectionSubtitle: Explore my projects and contributions, showcasing where I've worked and the impact I've made.

messierNotes.name: Messier Notes
messierNotes.description: Messier Notes is a productivity tool, offering task management, note-taking, and collaboration in one seamless platform.

kaleAcquisition.name: Kale-acquisition
kaleAcquisition.description: Worked on a landing page for a platform that helps recruiting companies eliminate manual prospecting and research, streamlining outreach through automation and efficiency.

smoothPlayer.name: Smooth Player
smoothPlayer.description: Smooth Player is a sleek Spotify clone with playlist management, song search, and a responsive design for seamless music streaming.

venator.name: Venator
venator.description: Venator is an AI-powered inbox integrated with LinkedIn and Email, designed to identify and engage potential clients, streamlining prospecting and outreach.

socialMate.name: Social Mate
socialMate.description: Social Mate is a web platform designed to help students share information, collaborate, and communicate effectively to achieve better results in tests.

getInTouch.title: Let's work together
getInTouch.subtitle: Want to discuss an opportunity to create something great? I'm ready when you are.
